business.name: Southern boy's Do It All LLC
business.tagline: From doors to decks — we handle it all

hero.headline: The *go-to crew* for everything your home needs
hero.subheadline: One call fixes doors, bathrooms, fences, storm damage — whatever life throws at your house.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: If it's broken, we fix it
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to full remodels — no job too big or small

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Wood rot, drywall, electrical fixes. We put your house back together right.

services.title: Bathroom Remodels
services.description: Complete makeovers from start to finish. We walk you through every step.

services.title: Fencing
services.description: New fences built with your family and pets in mind. Clean work, quick timeline.

services.title: Door Installation
services.description: Old doors falling apart? We install them correctly the first time.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Hurricane damage, roof repairs, deck restoration. We rebuild what storms break.

about.heading: Augusta's reliable handyman team
about.body: We're Josh, Amanda, and the crew that shows up when we say we will. Real people answering the phone, not a call center.

reviews.name: Sara W.
reviews.text: My old door was falling apart and wasn't even installed right. Josh went out of his way to help me. Reliable, honest, and amazing quality work.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Josh and Amanda walked us through every step of our bathroom remodel. Gave us options and advice. Some of the hardest workers out there!

reviews.name: Jana S.
reviews.text: Just had my fence done and couldn't be happier! Kept my dogs and kids' safety in mind. Clean, polite crew finished in less than a week.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Augusta and beyond
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the CSRA

cta.heading: Ready to get it done right?
cta.body: Free estimates on all projects. Call Josh and the crew — we'll walk you through it.
